label: The Drunken Kraken
summary: A rougher Freeport tavern where sailors, mercenaries, and hard-luck schemers drink under the gaze of a carved kraken figurehead.
notes: Migrated and normalized from legacy inn storage.
description: The Drunken Kraken is a seedier refuge in Freeport, offering warmth, noise, and just enough welcome to make dangerous people linger. Its weathered beams, sea-stained decor, and hard laughter make it a natural gathering place for those who live closer to the knife edge of the harbor.

details.proprietor: Endra Thorne, a hard-eyed former sailor with a quick temper, a quicker smile, and no patience for troublemakers.
details.atmosphere: Dim lantern light, spiced rum, grilled fish, loud shanties, and the coarse camaraderie of people who expect storms and betrayal.
details.clientele: Mercenaries, sailors, local fishermen, reckless adventurers, and old sea captains who prefer their gossip unfiltered.
details.notable_feature: A massive carved kraken figurehead hangs above the bar, rumored to have come from a ship lost in a storm and to still carry the sea's favor.
details.rumor_or_hook: Word spreads of a treasure map found on a drunken sailor, and everyone in the tavern has a different idea about whether it leads to gold or death.
